title: Turkey with Gravy
description: Tender cooked turkey breast served with rich gravy or a sweet cranberry sauce. Simple and satisfying.

ingredients.note: optional alternative to gravy, seeds strained out

steps.instruction: Ensure turkey is fully cooked. Remove all skin, cartilage, and any visible fat.
Chop turkey into small pieces and combine in a pan with warm gravy and butter.
Heat over medium-low, stirring gently, until warmed through.
Add warm broth, 1 tbsp at a time, if the mixture needs more moisture.
Adjust seasoning and serve warm with mashed potatoes or your favorite sides.

notes: For a festive twist, strain whole-berry cranberry sauce through a fine mesh sieve and use it in place of gravy. The natural sweetness of cranberry pairs beautifully with mild turkey.
